mapper.insert: insert into user(pid , did , tid , `name` , username , paw , grade) values (#{pid} , #{did} , #{tid} , #{name} , #{username} ,AES_ENCRYPT("1234",'zpepdi') , #{grade})

insert into user(pid , did , tid , `name` , username ,grade) value
( 4, #{item.department} , #{item.technology} , #{item.name} , #{item.username} , #{item.grade})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE did = values(did), tid = values(tid), grade = values(grade)
mapper.delete: delete u , s from `user` u left join grade_score s on u.id = s.score_id where u.id = #{id}
mapper.select: select u.id, u.name, u.did, u.tid, u.pid, d.name as department,grade, t.name as technology, p.name as `position`, u.username, u.paw_state as pawState from `user` u left join department d on d.id = u.did left join technology t on t.id = u.tid left join `position` p on p.id = u.pid where u.id = #{id}

select u.id , u.name , u.username, u.grade, d.name as department , t.name as technology ,p.`name` as `position` from `user` u left join `position` p on p.id = u.pid, technology t, department d where u.tid = t.id and u.did = d.id
and u.name like concat("%",#{name},"%")
and u.username like concat("%",#{username},"%")
GROUP BY u.id

select u.id , u.name , username , d.name as department , t.name as technology, IFNULL (s.grade_id, 0 ) as selected from `user` u left join grade_score s on u.id = score_id and s.grade_id = #{id}, department d, technology t where u.id <> #{id} and d.id = u.did and t.id = u.tid
and d.id in
#{item}
and t.id in
#{item}
and u.name like BINARY concat("%",#{name},"%")
and u.username like concat("%",#{username},"%")

select id from user where username in
#{user.username}
select id as `value` , `name` as label from `user` where tid = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT pt.tec_id AS tid, pu.user_id AS uid FROM project_tec pt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT u.tid, pu.project_id, pu.user_id FROM project_user pu, `user` u WHERE pu.power_id = 2 AND pu.user_id = u.id ) AS pu on pt.project_id = pu.project_id and pt.tec_id = pu.tid WHERE pt.project_id = #{id}
select id , `name` from `user` where `name` like concat("%",#{name},"%") union distinct select id , `name` from `user` where `username` like concat("%",#{name},"%")

select distinct u.id , u.name as name, u.username , d.name as department , t.name as technology , us.designer , us.personal , us.coordinate, 1 as `role` from `user` u left join user_score us on us.grade_id = #{id} and u.id = us.score_id , department d, technology t where u.id <> #{id} and u.did = d.id and u.tid = t.id and u.id not in( select id from score_manage sm where sm.score_id = #{id} and sm.scored_id = u.id and sm.state = 1 )

select u.id , u.name , u.username , u.grade , d.name as department , t.name as technology , p.name as power from `user` u, technology t , power p , department d where u.pid = p.id and u.tid = t.id and u.did = d.id and u.id = #{id}

select up.id , p.id as `position` , p.name, up.department_id , d.`name` as dep from `position` p, user_position up LEFT JOIN department d on d.id = up.department_id where p.id = up.position_id and up.user_id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.`name`, username, d.NAME AS department, t.NAME AS technology FROM `user` u, department d, technology t, ( SELECT u.id FROM `user` u WHERE pid <> 5 UNION SELECT u.id FROM `user` u, project p WHERE u.pid = 5 AND FIND_IN_SET( u.`name`, REPLACE ( p.general, ";", "," )) UNION SELECT u.id FROM `user` u, volume v WHERE u.pid = 5 AND FIND_IN_SET( u.`name`, REPLACE ( v.principal, ";", "," )) ) AS human WHERE u.`id` = human.id AND u.did = d.id AND u.tid = t.id AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT id FROM user_score us WHERE u.id = us.grade_id)

SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.`name`, username, d.id as did, t.id as tid, d.NAME AS department, t.NAME AS technology FROM `user` u, department d, technology t, ( SELECT principal AS `name` FROM volume v WHERE v.planned_start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.shot_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.actual_publication_date >= #{sqlDate} OR ( v.shot_date = "" AND v.start_date != "" ) UNION SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX( v.principal, ";", 1 ) AS `name` FROM volume v WHERE v.planned_start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.shot_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.actual_publication_date >= #{sqlDate} OR ( v.shot_date = "" AND v.start_date != "" ) UNION SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX( v.principal, ";", - 1 ) AS `name` FROM volume v WHERE v.planned_start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.start_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.shot_date >= #{sqlDate} OR v.actual_publication_date >= #{sqlDate} OR ( v.shot_date = "" AND v.start_date != "" ) UNION SELECT general AS `name` FROM project UNION SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX( general, ";",- 1 ) AS `name` FROM project UNION SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX( general, ";",- 1 ) AS `name` FROM project ) AS human, ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM user_position ) AS up WHERE ( u.`name` = human.`name` OR u.id = up.user_id ) AND u.did = d.id AND u.tid = t.id
select distinct u.`name` , username , d.name as department ,t.name as technology from `user` u, department d, technology t, user_score us where u.did = d.id and u.tid = t.id and us.grade_id = u.id

SELECT `name` FROM `user` u WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT id FROM volume WHERE FIND_IN_SET(u.name,REPLACE (`principal`, ";", "," )) UNION SELECT id FROM project WHERE FIND_IN_SET(u.name,REPLACE (`general`, ";", "," ))) ORDER BY username
SELECT id , `name` FROM `user` ORDER BY username

select concat_ws("-",t.did, t.id ,u.id ) as id, concat_ws("-",t.did, t.id) as pid, u.name as label from `user` u, technology t where t.id = #{id} and u.tid = t.id
AND EXISTS ( SELECT id FROM volume WHERE FIND_IN_SET(u.name,REPLACE (`principal`, ";", "," )) UNION SELECT id FROM project WHERE FIND_IN_SET(u.name,REPLACE (`general`, ";", "," )))

select concat_ws("-",t.did, t.id ,u.id ) as id, u.name as label, sm.state as state from technology t, `user` u LEFT JOIN score_manage sm on u.id = sm.scored_id and sm.score_id = #{id} where t.id = #{tid} and u.tid = t.id
select u.name as label , u.id as id, case when #{vid} Is Null then Null else #{vid} end as vid from technology t, `user` u where t.id = #{tid} and u.tid = t.id
select u.name as label , u.id as id, case when #{vid} Is Null then Null else #{vid} end as vid from technology t, `user` u where t.id = #{tid} and u.tid = t.id

SELECT u.id AS uid, u.name as name, u.grade, u.did AS did, p.id as pid, p.`name` AS `position`, d.`name` AS department, d.branch FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN `position` p ON p.id = u.pid LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = u.did WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT ifnull(SUM( designer),0) as designer, ifnull(SUM( checker ),0) as checker, ifnull(SUM( principal),0) as principal, ifnull(SUM( headman ),0) as headman FROM ( SELECT CASE role WHEN 1 THEN workday * designer END AS designer, CASE role WHEN 2 THEN workday * checker END AS checker, CASE role WHEN 3 THEN workday * principal END AS principal, CASE role WHEN 4 THEN workday * headman END AS headman FROM ( SELECT id, project_id, 1 AS role FROM volume WHERE designer = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 2 AS role FROM volume WHERE checker = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 3 AS role FROM volume WHERE actual_principal = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 4 AS role FROM volume WHERE headman = #{name} ) AS v, ( SELECT v.id, v.tec, w.workday, IFNULL( w.designer, IFNULL( t.designer, d.designer )) AS designer, IFNULL( w.checker, IFNULL( t.checker, d.checker )) AS checker, IFNULL( w.principal, IFNULL( t.principal, d.principal )) AS principal, IFNULL( w.headman, IFNULL( t.headman, d.headman )) AS headman FROM volume_workday w, volume v LEFT JOIN tec_ratio t ON v.project_id = t.project_id AND v.tec = t.tec, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w WHERE w.id = v.id GROUP BY v.role ) AS t
SELECT ifnull(SUM(h.`grant`),0) as designer FROM volume v, volume_workday_high h WHERE h.date = #{date} AND h.volume_id = v.id AND v.designer = #{name}

SELECT ifnull(SUM( designer-`grant` ),0) as designer, ifnull(SUM( checker ), 0) as checker, ifnull(SUM( principal ), 0) as principal, ifnull(SUM( headman ), 0) as headman FROM ( SELECT CASE role WHEN 1 THEN workday * designer END AS designer, CASE role WHEN 2 THEN workday * checker END AS checker, CASE role WHEN 3 THEN workday * principal END AS principal, CASE role WHEN 4 THEN workday * headman END AS headman, SUM(h.`grant`) as `grant` FROM ( SELECT id, project_id, 1 AS role FROM volume WHERE designer = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 2 AS role FROM volume WHERE checker = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 3 AS role FROM volume WHERE actual_principal = #{name} UNION SELECT id, project_id, 4 AS role FROM volume WHERE headman = #{name} ) AS v LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h on v.id = h.volume_id, ( SELECT v.id, v.tec, w.workday, IFNULL( w.designer, IFNULL( t.designer, d.designer )) AS designer, IFNULL( w.checker, IFNULL( t.checker, d.checker )) AS checker, IFNULL( w.principal, IFNULL( t.principal, d.principal )) AS principal, IFNULL( w.headman, IFNULL( t.headman, d.headman )) AS headman FROM volume_workday w, volume v LEFT JOIN tec_ratio t ON v.project_id = t.project_id AND v.tec = t.tec, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w WHERE w.id = v.id GROUP BY v.id , v.role ) AS t
SELECT ifnull(SUM( workday ),0) FROM workday_backup_user WHERE user_id = #{id} AND date = #{date}
SELECT ifnull(SUM( workday ),0) FROM virtual_workday WHERE user_id = #{id} AND date = #{date}
SELECT ifnull(SUM( workday ),0) FROM activity_workday WHERE user_id = #{id} AND date = #{date}

SELECT v.principal, w.workday, 1 AS type, v.`number` FROM volume_workday w, ( SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE designer = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE checker = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE actual_principal = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE headman = #{name} ) AS v WHERE w.volume_id = v.id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} UNION SELECT v.principal, h.`grant` AS workday, 2 AS type, v.`number` FROM volume_workday w, volume_workday_high h, ( SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE designer = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE checker = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE actual_principal = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE headman = #{name} ) AS v WHERE w.volume_id = v.id AND h.date = #{date} AND w.volume_id = h.volume_id UNION SELECT v.principal, ( w.workday - SUM( h.`grant` )) AS workday, 3 AS type, v.`number` FROM volume_workday w LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h ON w.volume_id = h.volume_id, ( SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE designer = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE checker = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE actual_principal = #{name} UNION SELECT id, number, principal FROM volume WHERE headman = #{name} ) AS v WHERE w.volume_id = v.id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} GROUP BY v.id UNION SELECT u.`name`, w.workday, 4 AS type, p.`number` AS number FROM workday_backup_user w, `user` u, project p WHERE u.id = w.issuer_id AND w.date = #{date} AND w.user_id = #{id} AND w.project_id = p.id UNION SELECT u.`name`, w.workday, 5 AS type, p.`number` AS number FROM virtual_workday w, `user` u, virtual_project p WHERE u.id = w.issuer_id AND w.date = #{date} AND w.user_id = #{id} AND w.virtual_id = p.id UNION SELECT u.`name`, w.workday, 6 AS type, p.`number` AS number FROM activity_workday w, `user` u, activity p WHERE u.id = w.issuer_id AND w.date = #{date} AND w.user_id = #{id} AND w.activity_id = p.id

select id, username, `name`, virtualCount, activityCount, designer + checker + principal + headman + designer_high2 + designer_high3 + checker_high3 + principal_high3 + headman_high3 + virtualCount + activityCount AS `sum`, designer + checker + principal + headman + designer_high2 + designer_high3 + checker_high3 + principal_high3 + headman_high3 AS volumeSum, designer, checker, principal, headman, designer_high2, designer_high3 + checker_high3 + principal_high3 + headman_high3 AS workday_high from ( SELECT u.id, u.username, u.`name`, IFNULL( SUM( w1.designer_ratio * w1.workday ), 0 ) AS designer, IFNULL( SUM( w2.checker_ratio * w2.workday ), 0 ) AS checker, IFNULL( SUM( w3.principal_ratio * w3.workday ), 0 ) AS principal, IFNULL( SUM( w4.headman_ratio * w4.workday ), 0 ) AS headman, IFNULL( SUM( h.`grant` ), 0 ) AS designer_high2, IFNULL( SUM( h1.designer_ratio * h1.workday ), 0 ) AS designer_high3, IFNULL( SUM( h2.checker_ratio * h2.workday ), 0 ) AS checker_high3, IFNULL( SUM( h3.principal_ratio * h3.workday ), 0 ) AS principal_high3, IFNULL( SUM( h4.headman_ratio * h4.workday ), 0 ) AS headman_high3, IFNULL( SUM( vw.workday ), 0 ) AS virtualCount, IFNULL( SUM( aw.workday ), 0 ) AS activityCount FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, w.workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w1 ON u.`name` = w1.designer LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, h.`grant`, v.designer FROM volume_workday_high h, volume v WHERE v.id = h.volume_id AND h.date = #{date} ) AS h ON h.designer = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, w.workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w2 ON w2.checker = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, w.workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w3 ON w3.actual_principal = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, w.workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 1 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 ) AS w4 ON w4.actual_principal = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, ( w.workday - IFNULL(SUM(h.`grant`), 0)) AS workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h ON h.volume_id = w.volume_id AND w.date = h.date, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 GROUP BY v.id ) AS h1 ON h1.designer = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, ( w.workday - IFNULL(SUM(h.`grant`), 0)) AS workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h ON h.volume_id = w.volume_id AND w.date = h.date, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 GROUP BY v.id ) AS h2 ON h2.checker = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, ( w.workday - IFNULL(SUM(h.`grant`), 0)) AS workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h ON h.volume_id = w.volume_id AND w.date = h.date, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 GROUP BY v.id ) AS h3 ON h3.actual_principal = u.`name` LEFT JOIN ( SELECT v.id, ( w.workday - IFNULL(SUM(h.`grant`), 0)) AS workday, v.designer, v.checker, v.actual_principal, v.headman, IFNULL(w.designer, d.designer) AS designer_ratio, IFNULL(w.checker, d.checker) AS checker_ratio, IFNULL(w.principal, d.principal) AS principal_ratio, IFNULL(w.headman, d.headman) AS headman_ratio FROM volume_workday w LEFT JOIN volume_workday_high h ON h.volume_id = w.volume_id AND w.date = h.date, volume v, default_ratio d WHERE v.id = w.volume_id AND w.state = 3 AND w.date = #{date} AND d.id = 1 GROUP BY v.id ) AS h4 ON h4.headman = u.`name` LEFT JOIN virtual_workday vw ON vw.user_id = u.id AND vw.date = #{date} LEFT JOIN activity_workday aw ON aw.user_id = u.id AND aw.date = #{date} GROUP BY u.id ) as t
